violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Observed frequent glove change without hand wash. (Example: Drive through sweep, prep/fill to go bag, then gloved up for food prep).

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris/limescale at ice drop. -Residue at upper surfaces around nozzles of drive through soda machine. -Debris in ice scoop holeder at driver through. -Limescale at ice scoop tray of ice machine.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Dishes stated as washed, sanitized and then rinsed. Obseerved dirty dishes in 1st sink, sanitize solution in 2nd sink, and dry dishes in 3rd sink.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Drainboard/rack/table space was insufficient to accommodate equipment/utensils. -No drain board present at dish pit.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris under cabinets/equipment throuhout kitchen. -Heavy debris below walk in cooler shelves. -Floor debris at floor below soda bibs and around utility equipment. -Dust at ceiling vent above hot line.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -2 employee phones at back prep top and on top of bun container lid.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -1st drive through window (unused for service) left open for air flow without window screen in place.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Cloth left on top of freezer near cookline between uses.--Sani Bucket used in kitchen and also at front table/guest area. *COS-made separate bucket for use at guest tables.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. -3 cans of #10 cans of cheese were placed into pans at approximately 11a.m. and left at room temperature until needed at hot line - found with temperature of 68-69F at 1:30 p.m.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Limescale build up at interior panel/ upper surfaces of ice machine. -Dust build up at drive through soda dispenser.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -#10 can storage rack has some crumb/food debris. -Grease build up in bottom cabinet below meat prep area. -Minimal frost build up at interior sides of chest freezers.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Water pitcher for nacho cheese was filled at hand sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust at ceiling vent and light fixtures above make line, and at wall/ceiling above drive through soda dispenser.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
